steps.name: Domain: distinct_repos helper + RepoPicker Enter/j/k navigation + f-key toggle
criteria: pub fn distinct_repos(commit_rows: &[CommitRecord]) -> Vec<(String, usize)> added to update.rs; returns (repo_name, count) pairs sorted by count desc; repo_name is last URL path segment (rsplit('/').next()), or folder last segment if URL is None; records with same repo_name are grouped
handle_repo_picker_key handles KeyCode::Char('j') | KeyCode::Down: picker_cursor advances (wraps at end of distinct_repos list)
handle_repo_picker_key handles KeyCode::Char('k') | KeyCode::Up: picker_cursor retreats (wraps at start)
handle_repo_picker_key handles KeyCode::Enter: sets active_repo_filter = Some(repo_name at picker_cursor), recomputes filtered_rows, sets mode = Browse, resets cursor = 0
handle_repo_picker_key handles KeyCode::Esc: sets mode = Browse (active_repo_filter unchanged)
handle_browse_key: KeyCode::Char('f') when active_repo_filter is Some clears filter (sets to None), recomputes filtered_rows; when None opens picker as before
steps.implementation_notes: distinct_repos(commit_rows: &[CommitRecord]) -> Vec<(String, usize)>: extract repo_name = url.as_deref().and_then(|u| u.rsplit('/').next()).map(str::to_string).or_else(|| folder.rsplit('/').next().map(str::to_string)).unwrap_or_default(); group by repo_name using BTreeMap or sort+dedup; return sorted by count descending. handle_repo_picker_key Enter: let repos = distinct_repos(&model.commit_rows); if repos is empty do nothing; else set active_repo_filter = Some(repos[model.picker_cursor].0.clone()); model.filtered_rows = recompute_filtered(&model); model.mode = AppMode::Browse; model.cursor = 0. j/k: repos.len() guard; wrap with modulo. handle_browse_key f: if model.active_repo_filter.is_some() { model.active_repo_filter = None; model.filtered_rows = recompute_filtered(&model); } else { model.mode = AppMode::RepoPicker; model.picker_cursor = 0; }

steps.name: TUI: RepoPicker overlay rendering + status bar filter indicator
criteria: When model.mode == AppMode::RepoPicker, render_main_area renders a RepoPicker overlay instead of the commit table
RepoPicker overlay shows a bordered Block titled 'Repo Filter' listing all distinct repos with counts: '{repo_name} ({count})'
Currently selected row (picker_cursor) is highlighted with reversed style
When active_repo_filter is Some in Browse mode, status bar shows '{repo_name} • {filtered} of {total} commits | f clear | q quit'
When active_repo_filter is None in Browse mode, status bar shows existing 'Row N/M | q quit' format (unchanged)
steps.implementation_notes: In render_main_area, add branch before render_commit_table: if model.mode == AppMode::RepoPicker { render_repo_picker(model, frame, area); return; }. render_repo_picker: call distinct_repos(&model.commit_rows) to get (name, count) pairs; build Vec<Row> with Cell(format!('{name} ({count})')); use a Table or List widget inside a bordered Block titled 'Repo Filter'; highlight model.picker_cursor row with reversed style. Status bar: add arm for active_repo_filter when mode is Browse: if model.mode == AppMode::Browse && model.active_repo_filter.is_some() { let name = model.active_repo_filter.as_ref().unwrap(); format!('{name} • {}/{} commits | f clear | q quit', model.filtered_rows.len(), model.commit_rows.len()) }. Use pub fn distinct_repos from update.rs (import: use crate::domain::update::distinct_repos;). Also export distinct_repos as pub from update.rs.

validation.note: 2-step scope for slice-06. AppMode::RepoPicker, active_repo_filter, and repo_filter_matches already exist. Steps: domain navigation + toggle logic (06-01), then picker overlay + status bar (06-02).
